title: BenchmarkResults
description: Output of one benchmark run: model, library version, summary metrics, and per-rule details.

library_commit.description: Full git commit hash of the problem-reductions library used

bugs_found.description: Number of verified, novel bugs found

test.description: Carried through from the submission: scored + stored privately but excluded from the public leaderboard.

total_cost_usd.description: Total spend in USD — re-metered by the backend as usage_totals × prices (falls back to the self-reported figure only for legacy submissions without those).

total_tokens_k.description: Total tokens used (in thousands); the sum of usage_totals / 1000.

usage_totals.description: Aggregate token usage in the four billed buckets (input/output/cache_read/cache_write) the cost was metered from. The reproducible primitive — lets any reader recompute cost under other prices.

prices.description: Declared per-token price snapshot (USD per 1M tokens) the cost was metered from; dated by the submission's created_at. null for legacy/FAKE submissions.

efficiency_bugs_per_ktok.description: Primary fair metric: bugs per 1000 tokens

efficiency_bugs_per_dollar.description: Practical metric: bugs per dollar spent

rules_tested.description: Number of rules the model attempted

certificate.description: Counterexample certificate (present only when result=bug_found or rejected). The backend re-derives the bundle from source via pred; only rule, source, and the target type are needed.

bundle.description: Reduction bundle (pred reduce JSON); supplies the target type

target_config.description: Optional witness: a target solution that mis-extracts

violation.description: Optional free-form label; the backend derives the authoritative one

verify_details.description: Details from independent verification (keys vary by violation type)

reject_reason.description: Why the certificate was rejected (present only when result=rejected)
